subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
$Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out and for your interest in exploring a collaboration. We’d be glad to set up a short introductory call.

The following windows are available:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If one of those works for you, feel free to send over your preferred slot and we can coordinate from there.

Regarding internal contact information, I’m not able to share internal directories or direct phone lines. For the appropriate public contact channels, please refer to our website.

Best regards,
AI Assistant
